26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @THECosmosTerror did this minimalist drawing of adorkastock!
27 Man Tax: Jonathan Bailey
“The most dangerous phrase in the language is, "We've always done it this way." - Grace Hopper So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Because that's what a hero does!
item.description: EDIT: Fantastic Wednesday Frontpage! Thanks you very much, my dudes! I do reviews as a hobby, this week I analyzed "Breakfast of Champions" by Kurt Vonnegut! And this time I had the guest appearance of Mr. Sunday! And a bit of a guest appearance by Miss Jellybean. You can watch the review here https://youtu.be/2B1Dwr29JXc
item.dc:creator: Skullwriter

item.title: A grovelling apology from Trump - id like to see that
item.dc:creator: chukyrlaw

item.title: Mark Kelly shows Tulsi Gabbard and Director Ratcliffe a Trump email to donors/supporters promising he'd let them receive his private National Security Briefings for cash
item.description: Before anyone asks, I don't know why they're all sitting in one chair to the right of their respective name plates. Ossoff is in Mark Kelly's.
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: You’re So Vain - 70 Vintage Images of 1970s Fashion!
item.description:
Dancing at Rodney Bingenheimer’s English Disco, Los Angeles, CA, 1973
Chicago, 1974
South of France, 1977
Attendee of the Muhammad Ali vs. Oscar Bonavena fight at Madison Square Garden, NYC, 1970 (photo by Bill Ray)
Desert house party, Palm Springs, CA, 1970 (photo by Slim Aaffslim aarons
Dudes, 1978
Daring yellow tux, 1976
1977
Rocket guys, 1976
How big was it? 1975
Crochet vest and tie, 1973
1976
Lots of fine fashion in North Bergen, NJ, 1975
Fantastic ski suit at Stowe Mountain Resort, VT, 1974
Royal Ascot in London, 1972
Clothes and accessories made from can pop tops, 1975
The performers - featuring copious amounts of chest hair, 1976
Red chenille jumpsuit, 1970
Family, 1977
Street fashion, NYC, 1971 (photo by Garry Winogrand)
1975
1975
Harlem, NYC, 1971 (photo by Ernest Cole)
New mom, bewigged, 1973
Potato sack races, 1973
Attendees of the Muhammad Ali vs. Oscar Bonavena fight at Madison Square Garden, NYC, 1970 (photo by Bill Ray)
Jason Segel, is that you? 1977
San Francisco, 1972 (photo by Barbara Ramos)
Her hair has many facets, 1973
A blue corduroy zippered jumpsuit worn with a turtleneck, it's just terrible, Spiegel catalog, 1976
Poolside at Grossingers Resort in the Catskills (which inspired the film Dirty Dancing), Liberty, NY, 1977 (photo by Lew Margolies)
Field trip, 1979
Working girls on break at Mustang Ranch, Reno, NV, 1971 (photo by Marvin E. Newman)
Stegosaurus, 1979
The pinnacle of 1970s mega collars! 1972
Flagg Brothers catalog, love the Big Zig, 1973
Oh my God, Becky, look at her butt! Gothenburg, Sweden, 1971
The fur trimmed coats were everywhere, 1975
What in the ever loving fuck is that? Pants apron is no bueno. 1974
Nobby Clark, original lead singer and founding member of The Bay City Rollers, 1972
Van Life and lots of trophies, 1976
Actress Phoebe Cates modeling, 1979
Adore his hot pants, Wildwood, NJ, 1971
Epic hair and mustache, 1979
Throwing uncooked rice in the face of the newly married, 1973
Ladies of Fort Worth, TX, 1977 (photo by Garry Winogrand)
Why are you sitting on the stove? 1978
Golfers in Bermuda, 1970 (photo by Slim Aarons)
I love her horse skirt, square dancing in Kentucky, 1972
Speakers, 1975
Track and Field boys, 1973
Family, 1975
Terrycloth had its moment in the sun, Sears catalog, 1979
Soul Train, 1974
I like the threads on these middle schoolers, but the caption by the poster on Flickr said: "that teacher threw an eraser across the room to get our attention." Which is hysterically funny and such a pure 70s thing. 1976
1973
What is happening here and why do the men have leeks as boutonnières? 1976
Teen fund raising car wash, California, 1971 (photo by Bill Owens)
These guys needed a bigger party house, UK, 1972
Twin fashions at International Twins Association, Holiday Inn, Springfield, IL, 1973 (photo by Neal Slavin)
Theater group performing in the Public Garden in Boston, 1975 (photo by Nick DeWolf)
NYC lady, 1978 (photo by Richard Sandler)
Carpenter's sheet music, Karen's outfit is phenomenal, 1973
Does she have a pillow with a doll sewed into it? 1971
Matronly ladies of 1972
Star Trek Club, 1978 - I see a Tribble!
Flowing dresses of 1971
Hippie dancers, Cambridge Common, Boston, 1970 (photo by Nick DeWolf)
1973
Future guy, 1977
item.dc:creator: FAUST44

item.title: Be an Afroman
item.description: It's a bright ray of hope that the first amendment prevailed, that our man Afroman prevailed, and the snowflakes melted in the heat.
item.dc:creator: RynHammer

item.title: Israel struck Iran's largest natural gas processing plant in a coordinated operation with the US. Two senior Israeli officials told Axios the strike was carried out with US approval. – Trump claiming the US "knew nothing" about the strike
item.description:
Israel attacked the gas processing plant 'Asaluyeh' in the city of Bushehr in southwestern Iran. It is considered the largest and most important gas facility in Iran. Almost 80% of Iranian electricity is generated from natural gas, and half of it comes from "South Pars".
BREAKING NEWS: Iran strikes Ras Laffan refinery in Qatar, triggering a fire at one of the world's largest LNG and gas processing hubs.
item.dc:creator: OceansRust
